description_long: This is a large, heavily armored military tank with a low-profile turret and a long, prominent main cannon extending from the front. The vehicle features a dark green exterior with angular, sloped armor panels covering the entire body, providing enhanced protection. The tank is equipped with two large hatches on the turret, several ventilation grilles, and two tall radio antennas at the rear. The sides display a set of seven large, rugged road wheels on each track, indicating a tracked propulsion system for traversing rough terrain. The front hull has additional armor plating and what appear to be headlights or vision blocks. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external markings and a matte finish to reduce visibility.
description: A large, dark green armored tank with a long cannon, sloped armor, and tracked wheels. The vehicle has a low-profile turret, antennas, and rugged features for combat use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cannon, sloped frontal armor, and two hatches on the turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the cannon, the seven road wheels, and the rear-mounted antennas.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, ventilation grilles, and the two antennas extending upward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, road wheels, and turret details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; reinforced turret and hull; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green paint scheme; no visible camouflage pattern.
